argument: The contested claim asserts that Devin Marsh founded DataLoom in March 2019. The primary evidence for this claim is Marsh's own investor deck [deck], which lacks independent corroboration. Additional professional profiles and conference appearances list Marsh as an affiliate of Stripe during this time [web], with no mention of DataLoom, suggesting he was employed full-time elsewhere, which casts doubt on the claimed founding date. Furthermore, no Form D filing for DataLoom's purported $4M seed round was found [web], nor does Cisco list DataLoom as an acquisition [web], undermining the legitimacy of DataLoom as a viable company at that time. While Marsh could have founded DataLoom as a side project, without independent confirmation, the claim is overstated and unsupported.
